form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Warragul (23.14) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing a 5.5 lengths fourth. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 435m. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 435m at this track behind Dr. Cougar beaten 6 lengths (24.81). Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd over 400m at Warragul beaten 0.8 lengths (22.80) behind Paw Ferna in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 2. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 8 lengths behind Lethal Avenger over 435m. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 435m at this track. Safely held last time and looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crossed out entering home straight collided, fell and checked.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 460m at Warragul. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 435m at this track beaten 10 lengths (25.31) behind Dr. Erica in a Grade 5 on April 5. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.
